name: tako-mcp
title: Tako MCP Server
description: Create and discover data visualizations. Search Tako's knowledge base of 100K+ charts covering economics, finance, demographics, and technology. Create custom charts from raw data using 15+ chart types including timeseries, bar charts, scatter plots, pie charts, maps, heatmaps, treemaps, and more.

tools.name: knowledge_search
tools.description: Search Tako's knowledge base for charts and data visualizations on any topic. Use when a user asks about data trends, comparisons, or statistics.

tools.name: explore_knowledge_graph
tools.description: Discover available entities, metrics, cohorts, and time periods. Use to understand what data is available before searching.

tools.name: get_chart_image
tools.description: Get a static PNG preview image URL for a chart.

tools.name: get_card_insights
tools.description: Get AI-generated insights and analysis for a chart.

tools.name: list_chart_schemas
tools.description: List all available chart templates for creating custom visualizations.

tools.name: get_chart_schema
tools.description: Get the detailed schema and data format for a specific chart type.

tools.name: create_chart
tools.description: Create a new interactive chart from raw data using 15+ chart types including timeseries, bar charts, scatter plots, pie charts, maps, and more.

tools.name: open_chart_ui
tools.description: Open a fully interactive chart with zooming, panning, and hover interactions via MCP-UI.

hosted.description: Connect directly to Tako's hosted MCP server without local installation.

authentication.description: Tako API token. Sign up at tako.com and create a token in your account settings.
